services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Interior & Exterior Painting

services.title: Interior Painting
services.description: Complete interior painting with clean, precise work. We protect your furniture and leave no trace behind.

services.title: Exterior Painting
services.description: Weather-resistant exterior painting that protects and beautifies your home for years to come.

services.title: Color Consultation
services.description: Expert advice on current trends and perfect color matching. We help you get exactly the look you want.

services.title: Surface Preparation
services.description: Proper prep work including moisture repair and surface treatment for lasting results.

about.heading: Precision painting in Toledo
about.body: We're known for getting the exact color right and working with meticulous cleanliness. You won't even know we've been painting.

reviews.name: Andres M.
reviews.text: Impeccable work from start to finish. Great professionalism and reliability, always meeting deadlines. Communication is easy and he fully understands what you need.

reviews.name: Esther D.
reviews.text: I always recommend Marcelo's work. Very clean painting - you can't even tell he's been there. Very professional and knows how to get the exact color right.

reviews.name: Paluiris
reviews.text: True professional! Fast and efficient work that exceeded my expectations. He worked with meticulous cleanliness - my house looks spotless!

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Toledo & surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Professional painting services throughout Northwest Ohio

cta.heading: Ready for a perfect paint job?
cta.body: Get your free estimate today. We'll discuss colors, timeline, and give you upfront pricing with no surprises.
